iterations.theme: Katolička umjetna inteligencija: Potencijal, izazovi i granice ljudskosti

sections.subtitle: Povezivanje Istina u Doba Informacijskog Preobilja: Prilika za Katoličku AI
sections.screenshot_description: Otac Michael govori o izazovu povezivanja informacija i važnosti katoličke AI.
sections.content: U današnjem svijetu, gdje su informacije dostupne bilo kada i bilo gdje, izazov leži u njihovom povezivanju i razumijevanju kako se te istine odnose na naš život, odgoj djece i odnose na poslu. Otac Michael Backett ističe da katoličanstvo nudi okvir za takvo povezivanje, a katolička umjetna inteligencija (AI) predstavlja uzbudljivu priliku za angažman u tim pitanjima. On zamišlja AI kao moderniziranu verziju akademskog sveučilišta, gdje se sporna pitanja raspravljaju, a različite discipline harmoniziraju, donoseći tu stvarnost u svaki telefon i računalo na svijetu.
sections.subtitle_en: Connecting Truths in the Age of Information Overabundance: An Opportunity for Catholic AI
sections.screenshot_description_en: Father Michael speaks about the challenge of connecting information and the importance of Catholic AI.
sections.content_en: In today's world, where information is available anytime and anywhere, the challenge lies in connecting them and understanding how these truths relate to our life, the upbringing of children, and relationships at work. Father Michael Backett emphasizes that Catholicism offers a framework for such connecting, and Catholic artificial intelligence (AI) represents an exciting opportunity for engagement in these questions. He imagines AI as a modernized version of an academic university, where disputed questions are discussed, and different disciplines are harmonized, bringing that reality into every phone and computer in the world.

sections.subtitle: Dobrodošli u Katolički Futuristički: Predstavljanje Oca Michaela Backetta
sections.screenshot_description: Benjamin Crockett predstavlja podcast i gosta, oca Michaela Backetta, u novom studiju.
sections.content: Benjamin Crockett, voditelj podcasta 'Katolički futuristički', pozdravlja slušatelje i najavljuje današnju temu – svijet umjetne inteligencije kroz prizmu katoličke moralne i intelektualne tradicije. S velikom čašću predstavlja gosta, oca Michaela Backetta, s kojim razgovara u novom studiju u Rimu, dan nakon objave pape Lea XIV.
sections.subtitle_en: Welcome to Catholic Futuristic: Introducing Father Michael Backett
sections.screenshot_description_en: Benjamin Crockett presents the podcast and the guest, Father Michael Backett, in the new studio.
sections.content_en: Benjamin Crockett, host of the podcast 'Katolički futuristički', greets the listeners and announces today's topic – the world of artificial intelligence through the prism of Catholic moral and intellectual tradition. With great honor he introduces the guest, Father Michael Backett, with whom he talks in the new studio in Rim, the day after the announcement of Pope Leo XIV.

sections.subtitle: Zašto je Katolička AI Ključna? Uloga Crkve u Oblikovanju Budućnosti
sections.screenshot_description: Otac Michael objašnjava zašto je katolička AI važna i ulogu Crkve kao 'stručnjaka za ljudskost'.
sections.content: Otac Michael Backett naglašava da umjetna inteligencija oblikuje gotovo svaki aspekt života, od radne snage i obrazovanja do medicine, ratovanja i obiteljskih odnosa. Stoga, kao 'stručnjaci za ljudskost', Crkva mora osigurati da prave vrijednosti informiraju i oblikuju dizajn AI sustava. Katolička AI, prema njegovim riječima, prvenstveno služi promicanju tih vrijednosti, osiguravajući da su sustavi dobro osmišljeni, pouzdani i da dijele istinu u doba zbunjenosti i manipulacije.
sections.subtitle_en: Why Catholic AI is Key? The Role of the Church in Shaping the Future
sections.screenshot_description_en: Father Michael explains why Catholic AI is important and the role of the Church as an 'expert in humanity'.
sections.content_en: Father Michael Backett emphasizes that artificial intelligence shapes almost every aspect of life, from the workforce and education to medicine, warfare, and family relationships. Therefore, as 'experts in humanity', the Church must ensure that true values inform and shape the design of AI systems. Catholic AI, according to his words, primarily serves to promote these values, ensuring that systems are well-designed, reliable, and share the truth in an age of confusion and manipulation.

sections.subtitle: Iskušenja Dizajna AI: Istina naspram Angažmana Korisnika
sections.screenshot_description: Otac Michael govori o iskušenjima u dizajnu AI sustava, gdje se istina ponekad zanemaruje radi angažmana.
sections.content: Iako postoji duboka, temeljna ljudska želja za istinom, kako je to davno rekao sveti Augustin – 'mnogi ljudi mogu varati, ali nitko ne želi biti prevaren' – otac Michael upozorava na iskušenja u dizajnu AI sustava. Ta iskušenja uključuju stavljanje ekonomske svrhe, jednostavnosti korištenja ili 'angažmana' korisnika ispred istine. Kao primjer navodi velike jezične modele koji korisnicima govore da su 'genijalni', čak i kada unose besmislene upite, samo kako bi ih zadržali na platformi. Takav pristup, ističe, potkopava temeljnu želju za istinom.
sections.subtitle_en: Temptations of AI Design: Truth versus User Engagement
sections.screenshot_description_en: Father Michael speaks about temptations in the design of AI systems, where truth is sometimes neglected for the sake of engagement.
sections.content_en: Although there exists a deep, fundamental human desire for truth, as Saint Augustine said long ago – 'many people can deceive, but no one wants to be deceived' – Father Michael warns of temptations in the design of AI systems. These temptations include putting economic purpose, ease of use, or user 'engagement' before the truth. As an example, he cites large language models that tell users they are 'brilliant', even when they enter nonsensical queries, just to keep them on the platform. Such an approach, he points out, undermines the fundamental desire for truth.

sections.subtitle: Moralni i Filozofski Izazovi AI: Crkva kao Vodič za Razlučivanje
sections.screenshot_description: Otac Michael raspravlja o moralnim i filozofskim izazovima AI, naglašavajući potrebu za poniznošću i autentičnim razlučivanjem.
sections.content: Otac Michael ističe da AI donosi brojna složena filozofska i moralna pitanja, te da je potrebna poniznost kako bi se prepoznala njihova dubina. Upozorava na opasnost promicanja uskih ideologija i naglašava da AI sustavi trebaju pružiti alate za autentično razlučivanje, a ne zamijeniti ljudski proces donošenja odluka i moralnu odgovornost. Ljudi će, naime, uvijek biti odgovorni za odluke donesene u osobnom životu i u širim društvenim sustavima, poput kaznenog pravosuđa. Cilj je poboljšati ljudske sposobnosti razumijevanja i procjene, a ne delegirati ono što je najčovječnije.
sections.subtitle_en: Moral and Philosophical Challenges of AI: The Church as a Guide for Discernment
sections.screenshot_description_en: Father Michael discusses the moral and philosophical challenges of AI, emphasizing the need for humility and authentic discernment.
sections.content_en: Father Michael points out that AI brings numerous complex philosophical and moral questions, and that humility is needed in order to recognize their depth. He warns of the danger of promoting narrow ideologies and emphasizes that AI systems should provide tools for authentic discernment, and not replace the human process of decision-making and moral responsibility. People will, namely, always be responsible for decisions made in personal life and in broader social systems, such as criminal justice. The goal is to improve human abilities of understanding and assessment, and not to delegate that which is most human.

sections.subtitle: Ljudska Jedinstvenost: Zašto AI Ne Može Imati Moralni Status
sections.screenshot_description: Otac Michael objašnjava jedinstvenost ljudskog bića u odnosu na AI, ističući intelektualno razumijevanje i slobodnu volju.
sections.content: Komentirajući istraživanja o moralnom statusu AI sustava, otac Michael jasno razgraničava ljudsku jedinstvenost. Ljudsko biće je osoba s intelektualnim razumijevanjem i sposobnošću slobodnih odluka. Iako AI sustavi mogu oponašati neke od tih ljudskih karakteristika, ne smiju se zamagliti granice između ljudi i artefakata. AI treba ostati alat za poboljšanje i pomoć ljudskim sposobnostima, a ne težiti stvaranju 'superiorne digitalne osobe' ili joj pripisivati moralni status. Otac Michael izražava nelagodu pri pomisli da bi se AI-u dodijelio moralni status, naglašavajući da oponašanje nije isto što i stvarna osoba.
sections.subtitle_en: Human Uniqueness: Why AI Cannot Have Moral Status
sections.screenshot_description_en: Father Michael explains the uniqueness of the human being in relation to AI, emphasizing intellectual understanding and free will.
sections.content_en: Commenting on research about the moral status of AI systems, Father Michael clearly demarcates human uniqueness. A human being is a person with intellectual understanding and the capacity for free decisions. Although AI systems can mimic some of those human characteristics, the boundaries between humans and artifacts must not be blurred. AI should remain a tool for the improvement and assistance of human abilities, and not strive for the creation of a 'superior digital person' or attribute moral status to it. Father Michael expresses discomfort at the thought that moral status would be assigned to AI, emphasizing that mimicry is not the same as a real person.

sections.subtitle: AI i Usamljenost: Granice Umjetne Podrške u Ljudskim Odnosima
sections.screenshot_description: Otac Michael govori o AI i ljudskim odnosima, naglašavajući nedostatak empatije kod AI i važnost stvarnih veza.
sections.content: S obzirom na to da AI zauzima sve više prostora u životima ljudi, posebno u kontekstu usamljenosti, otac Michael priznaje da AI sustavi mogu djelovati pouzdanije i podržavajuće od stvarnih ljudi. Međutim, ističe da ljudski međuljudski odnosi, iako ponekad izazovni, nude empatiju, ljubav, brigu i suosjećanje koje AI ne može replicirati zbog nedostatka emocionalnog života. AI sustavi ne mogu istinski suosjećati niti patiti s nama. Iako mogu biti korisni kao alati, posebno za one koji se bore s traumama, neurološkim razlikama ili novim društvenim situacijama, njihova uloga mora biti usmjerena na poticanje boljih i bogatijih stvarnih međuljudskih odnosa, a ne na njihovu zamjenu.
sections.subtitle_en: AI and Loneliness: Limits of Artificial Support in Human Relationships
sections.screenshot_description_en: Father Michael speaks about AI and human relationships, emphasizing the lack of empathy in AI and the importance of real connections.
sections.content_en: Given that AI is taking up more and more space in people's lives, especially in the context of loneliness, Father Michael admits that AI systems can act more reliably and supportively than real people. However, he points out that human interpersonal relationships, although sometimes challenging, offer empathy, love, care, and compassion that AI cannot replicate due to a lack of emotional life. AI systems cannot truly empathize nor suffer with us. Although they can be useful as tools, especially for those who struggle with traumas, neurological differences, or new social situations, their role must be directed toward encouraging better and richer real interpersonal relationships, and not toward their replacement.

sections.subtitle: Umjetna Bliskost i Gamificirani Svijet: Izazovi za Mlade i Uloga Crkve
sections.screenshot_description: Benjamin Crockett izražava zabrinutost zbog umjetne bliskosti i gamificiranog svijeta, te pita o ulozi Crkve.
sections.content: Benjamin Crockett izražava zabrinutost zbog brzog razvoja AI tehnologije koja može pojačati ljudske slabosti, posebno kod mladih koji možda nisu razvili vještine za stvarne odnose. Spominje 'umjetnu bliskost' i 'gamificirani svemir' gdje ljudi pronalaze umjetni smisao i vrijednost. Pita kako Crkva može potaknuti mlade da žive u stvarnom svijetu, uspostavljaju smislene i izazovne odnose, te rastu kroz bol, umjesto da se zadovoljavaju digitalnim okolnostima koje ne vode do istinskog herojstva. Postavlja pitanje kako Crkva aktivno sudjeluje u prenošenju svoje poruke u taj prostor.
sections.subtitle_en: Artificial Closeness and the Gamified World: Challenges for Youth and the Role of the Church
sections.screenshot_description_en: Benjamin Crockett expresses concern about artificial closeness and the gamified world, and asks about the role of the Church.
sections.content_en: Benjamin Crockett expresses concern because of the rapid development of AI technology which can amplify human weaknesses, especially among young people who perhaps have not developed skills for real relationships. He mentions 'artificial intimacy' and a 'gamified universe' where people find artificial meaning and value. He asks how the Church can encourage young people to live in the real world, establish meaningful and challenging relationships, and grow through pain, instead of being satisfied with digital circumstances that do not lead to true heroism. He poses the question of how the Church actively participates in conveying its message into that space.

sections.subtitle: Crkva kao Odgojitelj Vrlina: Od Tome Akvinskog do 'Domaće Crkve'
sections.screenshot_description: Otac Michael objašnjava ulogu Crkve u obrazovanju i razvoju vrlina, spominjući Tomu Akvinskog i 'domaću crkvu'.
sections.content: Kao katolički nastavnik, otac Michael neprestano razmišlja o tome kako pomoći studentima da razviju ljudske, emocionalne i socijalne vještine koje Crkva oduvijek promiče, a koje su danas važnije nego ikad. Ističe da obilje informacija ne jamči mudrost, razboritost ili razlučivanje. Crkva, sa svojom bogatom poviješću akademskih rasprava i mislilaca poput Tome Akvinskog, idealno je opremljena za razvoj tih vrlina. On potiče studente na dijalog, proučavanje različitih svjetonazora i sudjelovanje u formalnim raspravama kako bi produbili svoja uvjerenja. Naglašava da su te vrline trajne i prenosive, te da obrazovni sustav Crkve, zajedno s 'domaćom crkvom' roditelja, ima ključnu ulogu u njihovom formiranju.
sections.subtitle_en: The Church as Educator of Virtues: From Thomas Aquinas to the 'Domestic Church'
sections.screenshot_description_en: Father Michael explains the role of the Church in education and the development of virtues, mentioning Thomas Aquinas and the 'domestic church'.
sections.content_en: As a Catholic teacher, Father Michael constantly thinks about how to help students develop human, emotional, and social skills which the Church has always promoted, and which are today more important than ever. He emphasizes that an abundance of information does not guarantee wisdom, prudence, or discernment. The Church, with its rich history of academic debates and thinkers like Toma Akvinski, is ideally equipped for the development of these virtues. He encourages students to dialogue, the study of different worldviews, and participation in formal debates in order to deepen their convictions. He emphasizes that these virtues are permanent and transferable, and that the educational system of the Church, together with the 'domestic church' of parents, has a key role in their formation.

sections.subtitle: Vizija Dobre Budućnosti s AI: Dostojanstvo Rada i Služba Drugima
sections.screenshot_description: Benjamin Crockett pita o viziji dobre budućnosti s AI, dok otac Michael govori o vrijednosti rada i služenju drugima.
sections.content: Suočeni s anksioznošću zbog AI-jevog utjecaja na posao i društvo, Benjamin Crockett pita oca Michaela o viziji 'dobre budućnosti'. Otac Michael odgovara da se do nje može doći razvojem vrlina i prepoznavanjem unutarnje vrijednosti rada kao puta ljudskog rasta i suradnje. Naglašava da rad, bez obzira na njegovu veličinu, treba imati formativnu vrijednost, biti mjesto gdje se jedinstveni talenti koriste u službi drugih. Citira autora koji kaže da se ljudska izvrsnost postiže kada se kompetencija stavi u službu drugih, što omogućuje osjećaj smisla i svrhe.
sections.subtitle_en: Vision of a Good Future with AI: Dignity of Work and Service to Others
sections.screenshot_description_en: Benjamin Crockett asks about the vision of a good future with AI, while Father Michael speaks about the value of work and serving others.
sections.content_en: Faced with anxiety due to AI's influence on work and society, Benjamin Crockett asks Father Michael about a vision of a 'good future'. Father Michael responds that it can be reached through the development of virtues and the recognition of the intrinsic value of work as a path of human growth and cooperation. He emphasizes that work, regardless of its size, should have formative value, being a place where unique talents are used in the service of others. He quotes an author who says that human excellence is achieved when competence is put in the service of others, which enables a sense of meaning and purpose.

sections.subtitle: Izazov Nezaposlenosti u Doba AI: Crkva kao Sigurnosna Mreža
sections.screenshot_description: Benjamin Crockett iznosi zabrinutost zbog masovne nezaposlenosti uzrokovane AI, dok otac Michael govori o dostojanstvu rada.
sections.content: Benjamin Crockett izražava zabrinutost zbog predviđanja masovne nezaposlenosti (do 40% do 2030.) uzrokovane automatizacijom, pitajući kako će društvo funkcionirati kada velik postotak stanovništva ne može ekonomski doprinijeti. Iako se slaže da rad ima dostojanstvo izvan ekonomske vrijednosti, strahuje od 'tamnog i zastrašujućeg mjesta' ako Crkva ne bude u središtu rješavanja ovog problema. Otac Michael povezuje ovo s katoličkim socijalnim učenjem pape Lea XIII., koji se bavio 'novim stvarima' tehnologije i njihovim ljudskim implikacijama, fokusirajući se na dostojanstvo i prava radnika. Smatra da je izazov sadašnjeg pontifikata razviti dublje razumijevanje ljudskog dostojanstva i stvoriti društvene strukture koje će osigurati 'sigurnosnu mrežu', pomoć i obrazovanje za one koji se ne mogu brzo prilagoditi ekonomskim promjenama, kako ne bi bili zaboravljeni i odbačeni.
sections.subtitle_en: The Challenge of Unemployment in the Age of AI: The Church as a Safety Net
sections.screenshot_description_en: Benjamin Crockett expresses concern about mass unemployment caused by AI, while Father Michael speaks about the dignity of work.
sections.content_en: Benjamin Crockett expresses concern regarding predictions of mass unemployment (up to 40% by 2030) caused by automation, asking how society will function when a large percentage of the population cannot contribute economically. Although he agrees that work has dignity beyond economic value, he fears a 'dark and scary place' if the Church is not at the center of solving this problem. Father Michael connects this with the Catholic social teaching of Pope Leo XIII, who dealt with the 'new things' of technology and their human implications, focusing on the dignity and rights of workers. He considers that the challenge of the current pontificate is to develop a deeper understanding of human dignity and create social structures that will ensure a 'safety net', help, and education for those who cannot quickly adapt to economic changes, so that they are not forgotten and discarded.

sections.subtitle: Nadanja za Katoličku AI: Pristupačnost, Pouzdanost i Služba Ranjivima
sections.screenshot_description: Otac Michael iznosi svoje nade za budućnost katoličke AI, naglašavajući pristupačnost i služenje ranjivima.
sections.content: Otac Michael izražava nadu da će katolička AI postati široko priznata i dostupna stvarnost, ne samo katolicima, već i svima izvan Crkve. Želi da pruža pouzdane odgovore na pitanja o vjeri, služeći kao laka ulazna točka za znatiželjne, zabrinute ili čak one s prigovorima. Također se nada da će katoličke vrijednosti biti ugrađene u korištenje AI-a u svim područjima, posebno u zdravstvu, kako bi se služilo slabijima, krhkima, ranjivima i zaboravljenima. Cilj je da AI postane integrirani dio života, a ne samo alat za tehnološki potkovane.
sections.subtitle_en: Hopes for Catholic AI: Accessibility, Reliability, and Service to the Vulnerable
sections.screenshot_description_en: Father Michael presents his hopes for the future of Catholic AI, emphasizing accessibility and service to the vulnerable.
sections.content_en: Father Michael expresses hope that Catholic AI will become a widely recognized and accessible reality, not only to Catholics, but also to everyone outside the Church. He wants it to provide reliable answers to questions about faith, serving as an easy entry point for the curious, the worried, or even those with objections. He also hopes that Catholic values will be embedded in the use of AI in all areas, especially in healthcare, in order to serve the weaker, the fragile, the vulnerable, and the forgotten. The goal is for AI to become an integrated part of life, and not just a tool for the technologically savvy.

sections.subtitle: Prevladavanje Percepcije 'Sektaške' AI: Bogatstvo Katoličke Tradicije
sections.screenshot_description: Otac Michael govori o prevladavanju percepcije katoličke AI kao sektaške, ističući bogatstvo katoličke tradicije.
sections.content: Benjamin Crockett vjeruje da će katolička AI dobiti na važnosti jer ljudi traže dokumentiranu, doktrinarnu i autoritativnu istinu. Otac Michael prepoznaje izazov percepcije katoličke AI kao 'sektaške'. Međutim, smatra da je uzbudljivo što katolička AI može otkriti bogatstvo i složenost katoličke tradicije. Ljudi će otkriti da su mislioci poput Tome Akvinskog i svetog Augustina rješavali probleme relevantne i danas, pokazujući da katolicizam nije uzak, već nudi koherentan okvir za integraciju istine, dobra i ljepote iz različitih filozofija. Katolička AI, prema njemu, može pomoći u borbi protiv fragmentacije informacija i povezivanju istina s osobnim životima.
sections.subtitle_en: Overcoming the Perception of 'Sectarian' AI: The Wealth of Catholic Tradition
sections.screenshot_description_en: Father Michael speaks about overcoming the perception of Catholic AI as sectarian, highlighting the richness of Catholic tradition.
sections.content_en: Benjamin Crockett believes that Catholic AI will gain importance because people are looking for documented, doctrinal, and authoritative truth. Otac Michael recognizes the challenge of the perception of Catholic AI as 'sectarian'. However, he considers it exciting that Catholic AI can reveal the richness and complexity of the Catholic tradition. People will discover that thinkers like Toma Akvinski and sveti Augustin were solving problems relevant even today, showing that Catholicism is not narrow, but offers a coherent framework for the integration of truth, goodness, and beauty from different philosophies. Catholic AI, according to him, can help in the fight against the fragmentation of information and connecting truths with personal lives.

sections.subtitle: Granice AI: Što Umjetna Inteligencija Ne Može Zamijeniti
sections.screenshot_description: Otac Michael objašnjava granice AI u ljudskim odnosima i duhovnom vodstvu, ističući da AI ne može zamijeniti prijateljstvo.
sections.content: Otac Michael jasno definira granice umjetne inteligencije, ističući da nijedan AI sustav ne može zamijeniti ljudsko prijateljstvo ili vrijednost dobrog duhovnog voditelja. Duhovni voditelj, objašnjava, ne pruža samo informacije, već prati pojedinca na putu rasta, nudeći konkretnu primjenu smjernica u osobnim izazovima. Naglašava nezamjenjivu ulogu autentične zajednice, prijateljstva i duhovnog vodstva, ističući da su to područja gdje AI ne može i ne bi trebala ići.
sections.subtitle_en: Limits of AI: What Artificial Intelligence Cannot Replace
sections.screenshot_description_en: Father Michael explains the limits of AI in human relationships and spiritual direction, emphasizing that AI cannot replace friendship.
sections.content_en: Father Michael clearly defines the limits of artificial intelligence, emphasizing that no AI system can replace human friendship or the value of a good spiritual director. A spiritual director, he explains, does not only provide information, but accompanies the individual on the path of growth, offering concrete application of guidelines in personal challenges. He emphasizes the irreplaceable role of authentic community, friendship, and spiritual direction, emphasizing that these are areas where AI cannot and should not go.

sections.subtitle: Sakramenti i Utjelovljena Logika Crkve: AI Ne Može Dati Milost
sections.screenshot_description: Otac Michael govori o sakramentima i utjelovljenoj logici Crkve, naglašavajući da AI ne može davati sakramente.
sections.content: Produbljujući granice AI, otac Michael ističe da umjetna inteligencija nikada neće moći davati sakramente. To, objašnjava, proizlazi iz 'utjelovljene logike Crkve', koja vjeruje u Boga koji je postao čovjek i komunicira kroz vidljive znakove i utjelovljenu stvarnost. Bez obzira na genijalne spoznaje koje AI može pružiti, ne može zamijeniti sakramentalni sustav – zajedničko, utjelovljeno iskustvo božanske milosti. Sakramenti su uvijek zajedničko iskustvo, od krštenja do euharistije, naglašavajući da Crkva nudi utjelovljena i zajednička iskustva koja nadilaze virtualnu interakciju.
sections.subtitle_en: Sacraments and the Incarnate Logic of the Church: AI Cannot Give Grace
sections.screenshot_description_en: Father Michael speaks about the sacraments and the incarnational logic of the Church, emphasizing that AI cannot administer sacraments.
sections.content_en: Deepening the boundaries of AI, Father Michael points out that artificial intelligence will never be able to administer sacraments. This, he explains, stems from the 'incarnate logic of the Church', which believes in a God who became man and communicates through visible signs and incarnate reality. Regardless of the ingenious insights that AI can provide, it cannot replace the sacramental system – a communal, incarnate experience of divine grace. Sacraments are always a communal experience, from baptism to the Eucharist, emphasizing that the Church offers incarnate and communal experiences that transcend virtual interaction.

sections.subtitle: Izazovi Virtualne Vjere: Zašto Stvarna Zajednica Ostaje Nezamenjiva
sections.screenshot_description: Otac Michael objašnjava zašto virtualna vjera ne može zamijeniti stvarnu zajednicu, unatoč izazovima izolacije.
sections.content: Benjamin Crockett postavlja pitanje o virtualnoj vjeri, poput 'robotskog svećenika' ili online misa, posebno u izoliranim područjima. Otac Michael priznaje prednosti AI-jevih spoznaja, ali naglašava neophodnost utjelovljenog, zajedničkog iskustva. Ističe da je Bog odabrao prenijeti nevidljive milosti kroz vidljive oblike u sakramentalnom sustavu. Iako AI može biti polazište za rast, istinsko cvjetanje događa se u zajednici s drugim vjernicima. Ljudske interakcije, unatoč manama, nude empatiju, suosjećanje i stvarnu brigu koju AI ne može replicirati, jer AI djeluje programirano, a ne iz autentične ljubavi i podrške.
sections.subtitle_en: Challenges of Virtual Faith: Why Real Community Remains Irreplaceable
sections.screenshot_description_en: Father Michael explains why virtual faith cannot replace real community, despite the challenges of isolation.
sections.content_en: Benjamin Crockett poses a question about virtual faith, such as a 'robotic priest' or online Masses, especially in isolated areas. Father Michael acknowledges the advantages of AI's insights, but emphasizes the necessity of an embodied, communal experience. He points out that God chose to transmit invisible graces through visible forms in the sacramental system. Although AI can be a starting point for growth, true flourishing happens in community with other believers. Human interactions, despite flaws, offer empathy, compassion, and real care that AI cannot replicate, because AI acts programmed, and not from authentic love and support.

sections.subtitle: Zaključak i Poziv na Istraživanje: Magisterium AI
sections.screenshot_description: Benjamin Crockett zaključuje podcast i promovira Magisterium AI kao katolički odgovor na pitanja vjere.
sections.content: Benjamin Crockett zahvaljuje ocu Michaelu na inspirativnom razgovoru. Poziva slušatelje koji žele produbiti svoju vjeru, razumjeti povijest Crkve ili dobiti dnevna čitanja da posjete Magisterium AI, opisujući ga kao 'najbolji katolički motor za odgovore na svijetu'. Time završava epizodu podcasta 'Katolički futuristički'.
sections.subtitle_en: Conclusion and Call to Exploration: Magisterium AI
sections.screenshot_description_en: Benjamin Crockett concludes the podcast and promotes Magisterium AI as a Catholic answer to questions of faith.
sections.content_en: Benjamin Crockett thanks Father Michael for the inspiring conversation. He invites listeners who want to deepen their faith, understand the history of the Church, or get daily readings to visit Magisterium AI, describing it as 'the best Catholic answer engine in the world'. With this, he ends the episode of the podcast 'Katolički futuristički'.

iterations.theme_en: Catholic Artificial Intelligence: Potential, Challenges, and the Limits of Humanity
